transcript.clean_text: an emotional week at the Tour de Swiss would end with a stage eight time trial around the streets of Saint Gallen just over 25 and a half kilometers from start to finish a couple of climbs along the way and two time checks one after just 10 kilometers the other coming after 20 kilometers a descent to the Finish after a tough short climb before that and a fight for the general classification some of the best Early Times went to Riders such as Surin kraut was a Dane who set the fastest time another day new went on to break it kissed by our screen quickest at all the intermediate checks to the Finish and taking a lot of time away from his compatriot half a minute in fact European champion and try to honor the memory of his late friend Gino made up he was looking good all the way through the course as was what fanart black Jersey on his back as the man in charge of the points classification went to set the fastest time at the final time check and he went on to add to his lead on the final descent it's lodging kiss for our screen from the hot seat after his 25.6 kilometers against the clock fanat was looking good but wouldn't get close enough he'd end the week toward a Swiss debut without a stage win Rarity in his stage racing career then to the general classification starting in fourth position 46 seconds behind the leader Matthias skelmosa it would take a typical evening Wonder performance to do the job was at 18 seconds from skillmauser however he'd already won a time trial in Switzerland earlier this season amateur scale motor eight seconds on Felix girl who wasn't expected to be a feature in the TT and would turn out not to be but there was an early worry for the Dane scan was a 23.9 seconds down on avnapore that at the first check and as evening Paul was riding away to set the fastest time well now you saw on the road was the virtual yellow Jersey Abe Nepal taking 16 seconds out of bisiga the second check now you saw going even faster than him alarm Bells would have been ringing for Trixie alfredo but behind scale motor was really getting into a rhythm in fact he was improving exponentially going past the man who started two minutes before him Felix Scout and as even a pool came down the hill on one side he'd go into the lead when he got to the finish line ayuso though would be on his heels fresher faster and taking almost eight seconds out of him at the Finish to win the stage skin water had improved at the second time check and was now back into the virtual lead but he had to hold on after ayusa had gone like a rocket but ski motor 2 was putting in a time trial performance to remember holding on to his General classification league and winning the Tour de Swiss his first ever World Tour stage race with a second stage win of the week then for one hour you saw the 20 year old from Spain eight seconds to even a pool nine seconds to scare Mauser that too would be the podium but with skills on top I used to in second and even apple with a third place a tough week of racing and a victory for skillmore's up confirming his fantastic condition ahead of the Tour de France without you so in just his second race of the Season getting better ankorn took the king of the mountains Jersey for not was the points classification winner and kill him also too took the white jersey as the best young Rider the daughter Swiss was one we will never forget skin wars are the winner of course the name we all remember that of the late genomeda who left this world far too soon
